description: CDPHE: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Colorado.
citation: 6 CCR 1011-1 / Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment

description: CDPHE: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed room minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
CDPHE: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
CDPHE: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
CDPHE: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
CDPHE: Operating rooms 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
CDPHE: Colorado does NOT have a Certificate of Need law. All hospital construction requires CDPHE Health Facilities and Emergency Medical Services Division plan review.
CDPHE: High-altitude construction in Colorado may require additional HVAC design considerations; altitude >5,000 ft affects ACH calculations and outdoor air volume.
citation: Colorado High-Altitude HVAC Design Guidelines / ASHRAE High-Altitude Supplement
